_publications._publicationTitle: Autism Spectrum Disorder Symptom Profile Across the RASopathies.

_contextSnippet: Domain B: Mean Qualitative Abnormalities in Communication (95% CI) 13.7 (13.5–13.9) 14.8(14.2–15.4) 14.7 (14.1–15.2) 0.895
details: Mean Domain B (Communication) scores were 13.7 (95% CI: 13.5-13.9) in NF1+ASD, 14.8 (95% CI: 14.2-15.4) in NS+ASD, and 14.7 (95% CI: 14.1-15.2) in CFC+ASD (p=0.895)
